info.name: Indian Law Penal Code API
info.description: Comprehensive MERN backend API collection for all auth, legal, statistics, analytics, admin, JWT utility, and middleware practice endpoints.

body.raw:
{
  "sectionNumber": "302",
  "title": "Punishment for Murder",
  "description": "Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.",
  "actName": "IPC",
  "category": "Offenses Against Human Body",
  "punishmentType": "Capital Punishment / Life Imprisonment",
  "bailable": false,
  "cognizable": true
}
